record.field:
attachment_id = bag.get('tree_attachment_id') if not attachment_id: raise Exception('Missing Regaber discovery attachment generated by previous step.')
attachment = env['ir.attachment'].browse(attachment_id) if not attachment.exists(): raise Exception('Regaber discovery attachment not found.')
try: raw_json = base64.b64decode(attachment.datas or '') discovery_data = json.loads(raw_json) except Exception as e: raise Exception('Error decoding Regaber discovery attachment: %s' % e)
result = env['wua.waterconnection'].import_from_regaber_tree_json( discovery_data)
self.remote_id.message_post( body=u'[Regaber/WUA] sheds=%s waterconnections=%s watermeters=%s updates=%s skipped=%s' % ( result.get('created_irrigationsheds', 0), result.get('created_waterconnections', 0), result.get('created_watermeters', 0), result.get('updated_waterconnections', 0), result.get('skipped_meters', 0) ), attachment_ids=[attachment.id] )
bag['wua_import_result'] = result bag['attachment_name'] = attachment.datas_fname or attachment.name or '' bag['selected_project_id'] = discovery_data.get('selected_project_id') bag['selected_project_name'] = discovery_data.get('selected_project_name') or ''
